title: recall_decisions
description: Return decisions recorded against a named project, ordered by date descending, optionally filtered by an ISO 8601 since-date. A decision is any fact whose predicate is decided_in OR whose subject has type=decision. Capped at 200 items; older results are truncated and signalled.

project.description: Project name or alias. Alias-resolved the same way as recall_entity. The project entity is the scope for which decisions are returned.

since.description: Optional ISO 8601 calendar date. When present, only decisions on or after this date are returned. Date-only (no time) to keep the semantics local-day rather than instant-of-time.

project.description: The resolved project entity, or null if no project entity matched. When null, decisions is always empty.

decisions.description: Decisions ordered by date descending (newest first). Empty when the project has no decisions or the project itself did not resolve.

truncated.description: True when more than 200 decisions matched and the older tail was dropped. Pagination is reserved for a future minor version.

since.description: Echoes the since filter as applied, or null if no filter was provided.

PROJECT_REQUIRED.description: The project argument was missing or empty.

SINCE_INVALID.description: since was provided but is not a valid ISO 8601 calendar date (YYYY-MM-DD).

GRAPH_UNAVAILABLE.description: The local SQLite store could not be opened or is corrupted.

examples.name: all decisions for a project, no since filter

decisions.name: Ship rumination detector first; defer hyperfocus and sycophancy to Phase 3
Ship rumination detector first; defer hyperfocus and sycophancy to Phase 3

compatibility.policy: Additive-only within v0.1.x. New optional output fields MAY be appended. Pagination tokens are reserved for a future minor version; until then, the 200-item cap and truncated flag are the contract. Renaming or retyping any field requires a new major version with a parallel $id.
compatibility.privacy: Reads the local SQLite cognitive graph. No remote calls. Source strings on decisions are returned verbatim and never fetched.

id.description: Canonical id for the decision entity.

decided_on.description: Local calendar date on which the decision was recorded. Date-only to match the since filter semantics.

decided_by.description: People (or other entities) credited with the decision via decided_in facts. May be empty when the decision was recorded without an attributed subject.

source.description: Free-text origin (URL, message id, transcript citation). Stored verbatim; never fetched.

confidence.description: Declared confidence in the decision at recording time.

supersedes.description: Id of a prior decision this one supersedes, or null. Reserved for a future minor version to support decision-history chains; v0.1.0 always returns null.
